mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateCustomerList */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER A SET (ACNM ,ACSUMMARYNM ,ACGRP ,ACTYPE ,ACTYPE2 ,ACTYPEDT ,ZIPCD ,ADDR1 ,ADDR2 ,CEO ,TEL1 ,SALESPERSONKEY ,REPACKEY ,BIZTYPE ,BIZCTG ,REGNO ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,ACGRADE ,POINT ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY) = (SELECT B.ACNAME ,B.CUSTSUMMARYNM ,B.ACCOUNTGROUP ,'0' ,B.CUST_TYPE ,B.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL ,B.ZIPCODE ,B.ADDRESS1 ,B.ADDRESS2 ,B.CEO ,B.TEL1 ,B.SALESPERSONKEY ,B.REP_ACKEY ,B.BUSINESSTYPE ,B.BUSINESSCATEGORY ,B.REGNO ,B.VACCOUNT1 ,B.VACCOUNT2 ,B.VACCOUNT3 ,B.VACCOUNT4 ,B.CUST_GRADE ,B.POINT ,#{interfaceDate} ,#{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B WHERE A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ ) WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS C WHERE A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND C.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND C.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND C.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ )
mapper.insert:
/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertCustomerList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER ( OWKEY , ACKEY , ACNM , ACSUMMARYNM , ACGRP , ACTYPE , ACTYPE2 , ACTYPEDT , ZIPCD , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , CEO , TEL1 , SALESPERSONKEY
, REPACKEY
, BIZTYPE , BIZCTG , REGNO
, VACCOUNT1 , VACCOUNT2 , VACCOUNT3 , VACCOUNT4 , ACGRADE , POINT
, IFYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , B.ACKEY , B.ACNAME , B.CUSTSUMMARYNM , B.ACCOUNTGROUP , '0' , B.CUST_TYPE , B.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , B.ZIPCODE , B.ADDRESS1 , B.ADDRESS2 , B.CEO , B.TEL1 , B.SALESPERSONKEY
, B.REP_ACKEY
, B.BUSINESSTYPE , B.BUSINESSCATEGORY , B.REGNO
, B.VACCOUNT1 , B.VACCOUNT2 , B.VACCOUNT3 , B.VACCOUNT4 , B.CUST_GRADE , B.POINT
, 'Y' , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER A ON B.ACKEY = A.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ACKEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateAddridList */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER C SET ADDRID = nextval('seq_tadmin_mst_addr_t') WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T ADDR ON B.ADDRID = ADDR.ADDRID AND ADDR.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL AND A.ADDRESS1 IS NOT NULL AND (ADDR.ADDRID IS NULL OR (ADDR.ADDRID IS NOT NULL AND (TRIM(ADDR.STNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR2) OR TRIM(ADDR.CTYNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR1) OR TRIM(ADDR.ZIPCD) != TRIM(B.ZIPCD)) ) ) AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ACKEY = C.ACKEY )
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertAddrTList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T ( ADDRID , ADDNT , UNIT , STNM , CTYNM , ZIPCD , CNTRYCD , STACD , SHPGLOCNM , LAT , LON , ADDRSTTCD , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT B.ADDRID , NULL AS ADDNT , NULL AS UNIT , B.ADDR2 AS STNM , B.ADDR1 AS CTYNM , B.ZIPCD AS ZIPCD , 'KOR' AS CNTRYCD , NULL AS STACD , NULL AS SHPGLOCNM , 0 AS LAT , 0 AS LON , '1' AS ADDRSTTCD , 'N' AS DELYN , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T ADDR ON B.ADDRID = ADDR.ADDRID AND ADDR.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL AND A.ADDRESS1 IS NOT NULL AND (ADDR.ADDRID IS NULL OR (ADDR.ADDRID IS NOT NULL AND (TRIM(ADDR.STNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR2) OR TRIM(ADDR.CTYNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR1) OR TRIM(ADDR.ZIPCD) != TRIM(B.ZIPCD)) ) )

/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertWmsAddrTList */ INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_ADDR_T ( ADDRID , ADDNT , UNIT , STNM , CTYNM , ZIPCD , CNTRYCD , STACD , SHPGLOCNM , LAT , LON , ADDRSTTCD , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT B.ADDRID , NULL AS ADDNT , NULL AS UNIT , B.ADDR2 AS STNM , B.ADDR1 AS CTYNM , B.ZIPCD AS ZIPCD , 'KOR' AS CNTRYCD , NULL AS STACD , NULL AS SHPGLOCNM , 0 AS LAT , 0 AS LON , '1' AS ADDRSTTCD , 'N' AS DELYN , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ADDR_T ADDR ON B.ADDRID = ADDR.ADDRID AND ADDR.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL AND A.ADDRESS1 IS NOT NULL AND (ADDR.ADDRID IS NULL OR (ADDR.ADDRID IS NOT NULL AND (TRIM(ADDR.STNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR2) OR TRIM(ADDR.CTYNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR1) OR TRIM(ADDR.ZIPCD) != TRIM(B.ZIPCD)) ) )

/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertTmsAddrTList */ INSERT INTO TT_ADDR_T ( ADDRID , ADDNT , UNIT , STNM , CTYNM , ZIPCD , CNTRYCD , STACD , SHPGLOCNM , LAT , LON , ADDRSTTCD , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT B.ADDRID , NULL AS ADDNT , NULL AS UNIT , B.ADDR2 AS STNM , B.ADDR1 AS CTYNM , B.ZIPCD AS ZIPCD , 'KOR' AS CNTRYCD , NULL AS STACD , NULL AS SHPGLOCNM , 0 AS LAT , 0 AS LON , '1' AS ADDRSTTCD , 'N' AS DELYN , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TT_ADDR_T ADDR ON B.ADDRID = ADDR.ADDRID AND ADDR.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL AND A.ADDRESS1 IS NOT NULL AND (ADDR.ADDRID IS NULL OR (ADDR.ADDRID IS NOT NULL AND (TRIM(ADDR.STNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR2) OR TRIM(ADDR.CTYNM) != TRIM(B.ADDR1) OR TRIM(ADDR.ZIPCD) != TRIM(B.ZIPCD)) ) )
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateAccountList */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_AC A SET ( ACNM ,ACTYPE ,ADDRID ,ZIPCD ,ADDR1 ,ADDR2 ,CEO ,TEL1 ,REPACKEY ,REPACTYPE ,BIZTYPE ,BIZCTG ,REGNO ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,ACGRADE ,ACTYPE2 ,ACTYPEDT ,IFYN ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY) = (SELECT B.ACNAME , '1' /*일반거래처*/ , M.ADDRID , B.ZIPCODE , B.ADDRESS1 , B.ADDRESS2 , B.CEO , B.TEL1 , B.REP_ACKEY , '1' AS REP_ACTYPE , B.BUSINESSTYPE , B.BUSINESSCATEGORY , B.REGNO , B.VACCOUNT1 , B.VACCOUNT2 , B.VACCOUNT3 , B.VACCOUNT4 , B.CUST_GRADE , B.CUST_TYPE , B.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , 'Y' , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ ) WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS C WHERE A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND C.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND C.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND C.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ )

/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateStoreList */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_STORE A SET ( STORENAME ,STORETYPE ,ADDRID ,ZIPCD ,ADDR1 ,ADDR2 ,TEL1 ,REPSTOREKEY ,REGNO ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,CUSTGRADE ,CUSTTYPE ,CUSTDTTYPE ,IFYN ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY) = (SELECT B.ACNAME , '0' /* 운영중*/ , M.ADDRID , B.ZIPCODE , B.ADDRESS1 , B.ADDRESS2 , B.TEL1 , B.REP_ACKEY , B.REGNO , B.VACCOUNT1 , B.VACCOUNT2 , B.VACCOUNT3 , B.VACCOUNT4 , B.CUST_GRADE , B.CUST_TYPE , B.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , 'Y' , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE A.STORE_KEY = B.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ ) WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS C WHERE A.STOREKEY = C.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND C.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND C.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND C.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ )
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertAccountList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_AC( OWKEY ,ACKEY ,ACNM ,ACTYPE ,ADDRID ,ZIPCD ,ADDR1 ,ADDR2 ,CEO ,TEL1 ,REPACKEY ,REPACTYPE ,BIZTYPE ,BIZCTG ,REGNO ,ASNUSEYN ,CLOSDATE ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,ACGRADE ,ACTYPE2 ,ACTYPEDT ,IFYN ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT M.OWKEY , A.ACKEY , A.ACNAME , '1' , M.ADDRID , A.ZIPCODE , A.ADDRESS1 , A.ADDRESS2 , A.CEO , A.TEL1 , A.REP_ACKEY , '1' AS REP_ACTYPE , A.BUSINESSTYPE , A.BUSINESSCATEGORY , A.REGNO , 'N' , #{closdate} , A.VACCOUNT1 , A.VACCOUNT2 , A.VACCOUNT3 , A.VACCOUNT4 , A.CUST_GRADE , A.CUST_TYPE , A.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , 'Y' , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = B.OWKEY WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND B.ACKEY IS NULL

/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertStoreList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_STORE ( OWKEY ,STOREKEY ,STROENM ,STORETYPE ,FCTYPE ,ADDRID ,ZIPCD ,ADDR1 ,ADDR2 ,TEL1 ,REGNO ,CLOSDATE ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,CUSTGRADE ,CUSTTYPE ,CUSTDTTYPE ,IFYN ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT M.OWKEY , A.ACKEY , A.ACNAME , '0' , '0' , M.ADDRID , A.ZIPCODE , A.ADDRESS1 , A.ADDRESS2 , A.TEL1 , A.REGNO , #{closdate} , A.VACCOUNT1 , A.VACCOUNT2 , A.VACCOUNT3 , A.VACCOUNT4 , A.CUST_GRADE , A.CUST_TYPE , A.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , 'Y' , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_STORE B ON A.ACKEY = B.STOREKEY AND M.OWKEY = B.OWKEY WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND B.STOREKEY IS NULL

/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertTAdminMstAcxct */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ACXCT ( UPDATEURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,INSERTDATE ,CTKEY ,ACKEY ,STOREORDTYPE ,ACICGRTYPE ,ICGRPKEY ,RNDKEY ,OWKEY ,DELYN ) SELECT #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , CT.CTKEY , I.ACKEY , '0' AS STOREORDTYPE , '0' AS ACICGRTYPE , '02' AS ICGRPKEY , '0' AS RNDKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , 'N' AS DELYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS I JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.DELYN = 'N' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ACXCT A ON I.ACKEY = A.ACKEY AND CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND I.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ACKEY IS NULL

/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml - insertTAdminMstStorexct */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_STOREXCT ( UPDATEURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,INSERTDATE ,CTKEY ,STOREKEY ,RNDKEY ,ICGRPKEY ,OWKEY ) SELECT #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , CT.CTKEY , I.ACKEY AS STOREKEY , '0' AS RNDKEY , '02' AS ICGRPKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS I JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.DELYN = 'N' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_STOREXCT A ON I.ACKEY = A.STOREKEY AND CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND I.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.STOREKEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsStoreList */ UPDATE TT_MST_STORE A SET ( STORE_NAME ,STORE_TYPE ,ADDRID ,ZIPCODE ,ADDRESS1 ,ADDRESS2 ,TEL1 ,REGNO ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY) = (SELECT B.ACNAME ,'0' ,M.ADDRID ,B.ZIPCODE ,B.ADDRESS1 ,B.ADDRESS2 ,B.TEL1 ,B.REGNO ,B.VACCOUNT1 ,B.VACCOUNT2 ,B.VACCOUNT3 ,B.VACCOUNT4 ,#{interfaceDate} ,#{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE A.STORE_KEY = B.ACKEY AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ ) WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS C WHERE A.STORE_KEY = C.ACKEY AND C.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND C.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND C.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ )
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertTmsStoreList */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_STORE ( STORE_KEY ,STORE_NAME ,STORE_TYPE ,FCTYPE ,ADDRID ,ZIPCODE ,ADDRESS1 ,ADDRESS2 ,TEL1 ,REGNO ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,CLOSDATE ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT A.ACKEY , A.ACNAME , '0' , '0' , M.ADDRID , A.ZIPCODE , A.ADDRESS1 , A.ADDRESS2 , A.TEL1 , A.REGNO , A.VACCOUNT1 , A.VACCOUNT2 , A.VACCOUNT3 , A.VACCOUNT4 , #{closdate} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN TT_MST_STORE B ON A.ACKEY = B.STORE_KEY WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND B.STORE_KEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsMstStorexct */ UPDATE TT_MST_STOREXCT M SET ( UPDATEURKEY , UPDATEDATE , GRADE , POINT ) = ( SELECT #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , AD.ADCDDTKEY AS CUST_GRADE , I.POINT FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS I JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.DELYN = 'N' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ADCDDTNM , MIN(ADCDDTKEY) AS ADCDDTKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT WHERE LAKEY = 'KOR' AND ADCDHDKEY = 'STORE_GRADE' AND DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY ADCDDTNM ) AD ON I.CUST_GRADE = AD.ADCDDTNM WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND I.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND I.ACKEY = M.STORE_KEY AND CT.CTKEY = M.CTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS I JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.DELYN = 'N' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND I.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND I.ACKEY = M.STORE_KEY AND CT.CTKEY = M.CTKEY )
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml - insertTMsMstStorexct */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_STOREXCT ( UPDATEURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,INSERTDATE ,CLOSDATE ,CTKEY ,STORE_KEY ,DCKEY ,ICGRKEY ,GRADE ,POINT ) SELECT #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{closdate} , CT.CTKEY , I.ACKEY AS STORE_KEY , '0' AS DCKEY , '02' AS ICGRKEY , AD.ADCDDTKEY AS GRADE , I.POINT FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS I JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.DELYN = 'N' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TT_MST_STOREXCT A ON I.ACKEY = A.STORE_KEY AND CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ADCDDTNM , MIN(ADCDDTKEY) AS ADCDDTKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT WHERE LAKEY = 'KOR' AND ADCDHDKEY = 'STORE_GRADE' AND DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY ADCDDTNM ) AD ON I.CUST_GRADE = AD.ADCDDTNM WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND I.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.STORE_KEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateEAddridList */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER C SET ADDRID = ( SELECT T.ADDRID FROM ( SELECT A.ACKEY, MAX(ADDR.ADDRID) AS ADDRID FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (ZIPCD, CTYNM, STNM) ADDRID , ZIPCD , CTYNM , STNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND ZIPCD IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ZIPCD, CTYNM, STNM, ADDRID DESC ) ADDR ON A.ZIPCODE = ADDR.ZIPCD AND A.ADDRESS1 = ADDR.CTYNM AND A.ADDRESS2 = ADDR.STNM WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL AND A.ADDRESS1 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.ACKEY ) T WHERE T.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND C.OWKEY = #{owkey} ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (ZIPCD, CTYNM, STNM) ADDRID , ZIPCD , CTYNM , STNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND ZIPCD IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ZIPCD, CTYNM, STNM, ADDRID DESC ) ADDR ON A.ZIPCODE = ADDR.ZIPCD AND A.ADDRESS1 = ADDR.CTYNM AND A.ADDRESS2 = ADDR.STNM WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL AND A.ADDRESS1 IS NOT NULL AND A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY ) AND C.OWKEY = #{owkey}
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertTmsShpgLocT */ INSERT INTO TT_SHPG_LOC_T( SHPGLOCID , SHPGLOCCD , SHPGLOCNM , SHPGLOCTYPCD , ADDRID , APPTNEEDYN , TELNO1 , STTCD , DELYN , INSERTDATE , UPDATEDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT nextval('seq_tt_shpg_loc_t') AS SHPGLOCID , ACKEY, ACNAME, '1', ADDRID, 'N', TEL1, 'Y', 'N', INSERTDATE, UPDATEDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT A.ACKEY, CASE WHEN B.SHPGLOCCD IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN , A.ACNAME, M.ADDRID, A.TEL1, A.INSERTDATE, A.UPDATEDATE, A.INSERTURKEY, A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TT_SHPG_LOC_T B ON A.ACKEY = B.SHPGLOCCD WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ ) T WHERE T.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsAccountList */ UPDATE TT_MST_AC A SET ( ACNAME ,ACTYPE ,REGNO ,BUSINESSTYPE ,BUSINESSCATEGORY ,ADDRID ,ZIPCODE ,ADDRESS1 ,ADDRESS2 ,CEO ,REP_ACKEY ,REP_ACTYPE ,TEL1 ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY) = (SELECT B.ACNAME , '1' , B.REGNO , B.BUSINESSTYPE , B.BUSINESSCATEGORY , M.ADDRID , B.ZIPCODE , B.ADDRESS1 , B.ADDRESS2 , B.CEO , B.REP_ACKEY , M.REPACTYPE , B.TEL1 , B.VACCOUNT1 , B.VACCOUNT2 , B.VACCOUNT3 , B.VACCOUNT4 , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ ) WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS C WHERE A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND C.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND C.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND C.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ )
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertTmsAccountList */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_AC ( OWKEY , ACKEY , ACNAME , ACTYPE , ADDRID , ZIPCODE , ADDRESS1 , ADDRESS2 , TEL1 , REGNO , CEO , COUNTRYCODE , REP_ACKEY , REP_ACTYPE , VACCOUNT1 , VACCOUNT2 , VACCOUNT3 , VACCOUNT4 , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , A.ACKEY , A.ACNAME , '1' , M.ADDRID , A.ZIPCODE , A.ADDRESS1 , A.ADDRESS2 , A.TEL1 , A.REGNO , A.CEO , 'KOR' , A.REP_ACKEY , M.REPACTYPE , A.VACCOUNT1 , A.VACCOUNT2 , A.VACCOUNT3 , A.VACCOUNT4 , #{closdate} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC M ON A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN TT_MST_AC B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND B.ACKEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsAccountList */ UPDATE TWORK_MST_AC A SET ( ACNAME ,ACTYPE ,REGNO ,BUSINESSTYPE ,BUSINESSCATEGORY ,ADDRID ,ZIPCODE ,ADDRESS1 ,ADDRESS2 ,CEO ,REP_ACKEY ,REP_ACTYPE ,TEL1 ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,CUST_GRADE ,CUST_TYPE ,CUST_TYPE_DETAIL ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY) = (SELECT B.ACNAME , '1' , B.REGNO , B.BUSINESSTYPE , B.BUSINESSCATEGORY , M.ADDRID , B.ZIPCODE , B.ADDRESS1 , B.ADDRESS2 , B.CEO , B.REP_ACKEY , M.REPACTYPE , B.TEL1 , B.VACCOUNT1 , B.VACCOUNT2 , B.VACCOUNT3 , B.VACCOUNT4 , B.CUST_GRADE , B.CUST_TYPE , B.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND CT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS C INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND CT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND C.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND C.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND C.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY )
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertWmsAccountList */ INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_AC ( CTKEY , OWKEY , ACKEY , ACNAME , ACTYPE , ADDRID , ZIPCODE , ADDRESS1 , ADDRESS2 , TEL1 , REGNO , CEO , REP_ACKEY , REP_ACTYPE , VACCOUNT1 , VACCOUNT2 , VACCOUNT3 , VACCOUNT4 , CUST_GRADE , CUST_TYPE , CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT CT.CTKEY , #{owkey} , A.ACKEY , A.ACNAME , '1' , M.ADDRID , A.ZIPCODE , A.ADDRESS1 , A.ADDRESS2 , A.TEL1 , A.REGNO , A.CEO , A.REP_ACKEY , M.REP_ACTYPE , A.VACCOUNT1 , A.VACCOUNT2 , A.VACCOUNT3 , A.VACCOUNT4 , A.CUST_GRADE , A.CUST_TYPE , A.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , #{closdate} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC M ON A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AC B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND CT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND B.ACKEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsStoreList */ UPDATE TWORK_MST_STORE A SET ( STORE_NAME ,STORE_TYPE ,ADDRID ,ZIPCODE ,ADDRESS1 ,ADDRESS2 ,TEL1 ,REGNO ,VACCOUNT1 ,VACCOUNT2 ,VACCOUNT3 ,VACCOUNT4 ,CUST_GRADE ,CUST_TYPE ,CUST_TYPE_DETAIL ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY) = (SELECT B.ACNAME , '0' , M.ADDRID , B.ZIPCODE , B.ADDRESS1 , B.ADDRESS2 , B.TEL1 , B.REGNO , B.VACCOUNT1 , B.VACCOUNT2 , B.VACCOUNT3 , B.VACCOUNT4 , B.CUST_GRADE , B.CUST_TYPE , B.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL ,#{interfaceDate} ,#{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS B INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND CT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.STORE_KEY = B.ACKEY AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS C INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND CT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.STORE_KEY = C.ACKEY AND C.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND C.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND C.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY )
mapper.insert: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertWmsStoreList */ INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_STORE ( CTKEY , OWKEY , STORE_KEY , STORE_NAME , STORE_TYPE , FCTYPE , ADDRID , ZIPCODE , ADDRESS1 , ADDRESS2 , TEL1 , REGNO , VACCOUNT1 , VACCOUNT2 , VACCOUNT3 , VACCOUNT4 , CUST_GRADE , CUST_TYPE , CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT CT.CTKEY , #{owkey} , A.ACKEY , A.ACNAME , M.ACTYPE , '0' , M.ADDRID , A.ZIPCODE , A.ADDRESS1 , A.ADDRESS2 , A.TEL1 , A.REGNO , A.VACCOUNT1 , A.VACCOUNT2 , A.VACCOUNT3 , A.VACCOUNT4 , A.CUST_GRADE , A.CUST_TYPE , A.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL , #{closdate} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{interfaceDate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER M ON A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_STORE B ON A.ACKEY = B.STORE_KEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND CT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND A.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND B.STORE_KEY IS NULL

/* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml insertTmsMstAcxct */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_ACXCT ( UPDATEURKEY , UPDATEDATE , INSERTURKEY , INSERTDATE , CTKEY , ACKEY , STOREORDTYPE , ACICGRTYPE , ICGRKEY , DCKEY , OWKEY , DELYN ) SELECT #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , CT.CTKEY , I.ACKEY , '0' AS STOREORDTYPE , '0' AS ACICGRTYPE , '02' AS ICGRKEY , '0' AS DCKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , 'N' AS DELYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS I JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON CT.DELYN = 'N' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TT_MST_ACXCT A ON I.ACKEY = A.ACKEY AND CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND I.EMPSAVEYN = 'N' /*직원저장대상여부*/ AND A.ACKEY IS NULL
mapper.select: /* adm-master-customer-sql-oracle.xml selectAccountGroupUsrList */ SELECT CASE WHEN UR.URKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVE_YN , I.ACKEY AS URKEY , I.ACNAME AS URNAME , I.ACKEY AS URPW , OD.OWCDDTVALUE AS URTYP , I.TEL1 AS CP , I.POINT FROM TADMIN_INTF_CUSTOMERS I JOIN TADMIN_MST_OWCD_DT OD ON OD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND I.ACCOUNTGROUP = OD.OWCDDTKEY AND OD.OWCDHDKEY = #{accountgroupcode} AND OD.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_UR UR ON I.ACKEY = UR.URKEY WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND I.EMPSAVEYN = 'Y' /*직원저장대상여부*/
